header.bindPageTitle: Bind Agent to the current active tab

input.placeholder: Tell CoTabor what you want to do...
input.agentPlaceholder: Tell Agent what you want to do on the current page...

tabSwitch.title: Page Switch Detected
tabSwitch.body: You are sending instructions on a new page, but the previous context is bound to the old page.

stopConfirm.title: Force Stop Current Task
stopConfirm.subtitle: Use this for infinite loops, long hangs, or clearly off-track situations
stopConfirm.body: This will immediately interrupt the current execution and stop all subsequent steps.
stopConfirm.warning: Progress will not continue after stopping. If the page is just loading, wait a few seconds before deciding to interrupt.

type.stuck: Agent is blocked and needs your help

process.title: Agent Workflow
process.stoppingNotice: Force stop request received. The current task will safely stop after this step completes and will not proceed to the next node.

error.notion: 💡 Notion write failed. Check your Notion memory backend config in Settings.
error.apiKey: 💡 API authentication failed. Check your API key in Settings.
error.network: 💡 Network timeout or connection refused. Check your network.

agent.stopping: Stopping current task, waiting for step to complete...

experience.queued: Experience task added to background queue

drawer.title: Experience Processing Details
drawer.noCandidates: No candidate experiences to submit this time.

autoLaunch.title: Complex task detected. Start Swarm?
autoLaunch.description:
This looks like a task that may span multiple pages. Authorize Swarm Mode?

The system will split work across multiple AI assistants for parallel execution.
autoLaunch.single: Try single-agent mode on the current page

single.label: Single
single.tooltip: Single-agent mode, operating only on the current page.

auto.label: Auto
auto.tooltip: The system automatically decomposes the goal and coordinates multiple Agents when needed.

dag.label: Swarm
dag.tooltip: Run multiple Agents in parallel across isolated tabs for complex cross-page tasks.

logs.noActivePage: No active page found, cannot start Agent.
logs.intentSwarm: 🐝 Analysis complete: This is a complex/multi-page task (Reason: {{reason}}). Awaiting authorization for Swarm...
logs.intentSingle: 👤 Analysis complete: Recommendation is to stay on the current page (Reason: {{reason}}).
logs.intentFailed: ⚠️ Intent analysis failed, defaulting to execution.
logs.initializing: Initializing Agent and connecting to page...
logs.initializingSwarm: Initializing Swarm and connecting to pages...
logs.closeSwarmTabsFailed: ❌ Failed to close Swarm tab group: {{error}}

tab.errorNoPage: Error: Cannot bind, current page not found.
tab.errorNoUrl: Error: Cannot bind this page (cannot get URL).
tab.restrictedInjected: ⚠️ Current page has content injected by {{name}}, reading/clicking might be limited. Saved as session page.
tab.connectionFailed: ⚠️ CDP connection failed: {{error}}. Saved as session page, but some features may be unavailable.
tab.restrictedPage: ⚠️ Bound restricted page: {{title}}. Cannot read or operate on current page content, but Agent can open URLs to continue.
